description: Silent name propagation: block content contains stale [[Getting Started]] after target was renamed to 'Quick Start'. On save, the server silently corrects the inline ref and footer annotation. Not a conflict.

preconditions.description: RenameBlock 'Getting Started' to 'Quick Start' has already occurred, bumping vault version to 2

payload.content: This block covers the core concepts. For newcomers, see [[Getting Started]]. For deeper material, see [[Advanced Topics]].
